aiSummary: El pintor británico David Hockney falleció el 11 de junio a los 88 años. Su funeral, reservado a su pareja y a su sobrino, se celebró en silencio, mientras el mundo entero expresa su dolor y anuncia futuras ceremonias conmemorativas.
fullArticle:
By providing your information, you agree to our Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy.

Only two mourners were present at the funeral of renowned British figurative painter David Hockney, who died June 11 at the age of eighty-eight The Guardian reports. In accordance with the artist’s wishes, Hockney’s partner, Jean-Pierre Gonçalves de Lima, and his great-nephew, photographer Richard Hockney, who worked as his model and assistant, attended the intimate ceremony, held last week.

The painter’s death was greeted with an outpouring of tributes from around the globe. His publicist, Erica Bolton, told The Guardian that her office had been “overwhelmed” by tributes, and that several forthcoming memorial service...
imageAlt: Solo dos asistentes al funeral de David Hockney: un cierre íntimo para el gigante del arte
keyPoints: El artista británico David Hockney murió el 11 de junio, a los 88 años, tras una vida de más de 35.000 obras.

multimedia.alt: A man in his eighties wearing a dark suit stands in a cathedral before a stained glass window.

summary: El pintor británico David Hockney falleció el 11 de junio a los 88 años. Su funeral, reservado a su pareja y a su sobrino, se celebró en silencio, mientras el mundo entero expresa su dolor y anuncia futuras ceremonias conmemorativas.
title: Solo dos asistentes al funeral de David Hockney: un cierre íntimo para el gigante del arte
whyMatters: Esta noticia representa un desarrollo relevante en su sector.
